Quest Text

Description

You heard us Captain! Kill [amount] of Dread Moths. We are doing research on their pain receptors to come up with a better pesticide.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

This quest still contains placeholder markers in the client cache, so some counts or location names may only be partially resolved automatically.
